faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Get answers to common questions here

dataSafety.question: Is my data safe on Salix?
dataSafety.answer: Yes. We use industry-grade encryption, secure servers, and role-based access controls to protect your data at all times.

gettingStarted.question: How do I get started?
gettingStarted.answer: Sign up for a trial, connect your sales workspace, and follow the onboarding steps to go live in minutes.

crmCompatibility.question: Does it work with my CRM?
crmCompatibility.answer: Yes, Salix supports common CRM workflows and integrations to keep your pipeline and customer data in sync.

salesGoals.question: Can I track sales goals?
salesGoals.answer: Absolutely. You can set targets, monitor performance in real time, and review progress across teams and reps.
